title: The Temple at Senntisten

startPoint.en: Talk to Ali the Wise at his house in Nardah.
startPoint.es: Habla con Ali the Wise en su casa en Nardah.

children.title: Claim Kudos from Historian Minas in Varrock Museum for completing Shield of Arrav
Fully restore Senliten from the 'Missing My Mummy' quest
Full completion of Missing My Mummy
Partial completion of Garden of Tranquillity

items.name: Telekinetic Grab
items.display: Telekinetic Grab runes (one air and law rune for each cast; you must be on the standard spellbook)

recommended.name: Barrows amulet
recommended.display: 3 Barrows amulets (to skip 3 of the brothers if you don't want to fight all 6)

children.name: Coins
children.display: Coins (and optionally Ring of charos (a)) for carpet ride

recommended.name: Archaeology journal
recommended.display: Archaeology journal to teleport to Exam Centre

recommended.name: Drakan's medallion
recommended.display: Drakan's medallion to reach the Barrows faster. Alternatively, you can use the ectophial or the Canifis lodestone and travel through Mort Myre Swamp (the Nature Spirit quest is required for this). If a portal in War's Retreat is attuned to the Barrows, this may also be used.

recommended.name: Silverlight
recommended.display: Silverlight or darklight to slay the ice demon

kills: The six Barrows brothers (up to three may be skipped with barrows amulets): Dharok the Wretched (level 150) Karil the Tainted (level 150) Verac the Defiled (level 150) Ahrim the Blighted (level 150) Torag the Corrupted (level 150) Guthan the Infested (level 150)

rewards.display: 23,000 experience lamp for any chosen skill (level 50+)
Two 20,000 experience lamps for any chosen combat skill (level 50+)

rewards.name: Ancient Curses
rewards.display: Access to a new set of prayers, known as the Ancient Curses. You must read the Ancient hymnal, given to you by Azzanadra, in order to activate them.

rewards.name: Altar of Zaros
rewards.display: Access to the Altar of Zaros in the Senntisten Temple, located below the Varrock Dig Site. Praying at this altar boosts your prayer points to 15% over your current maximum level.

rewards.name: Ghorrock
rewards.display: Access to Ghorrock - an inhospitable and dangerous fortress to reach, but where iron and steel dragons, waterfiends, and icefiends can be found.

rewards.name: Items obtained from the Barrows Chest
rewards.display: Items obtained from the Barrows Chest

rewards.name: The Horn of Chill
rewards.display: The Horn of Chill (Unlocked when facing the ice demon; also possible to unlock by standing next to the central ice block on the first floor)

rewards.name: Zaros Stirs
rewards.display: Zaros Stirs (Unlocked at the end of the quest after entering the newly-refurnished altar)

postQuest.display: 75,000 experience lamp (related to the earlier Fate of the Gods quest). Skill must be level 80 or higher, excludes Prayer/Summoning. Can be used up to three times. Claimed by talking to Azzanadra in the Senntisten Temple near the Altar of Zaros and choosing the 3rd/4th chat option "Zaros's return".

text.en: 3 backpack spaces
1 additional backpack space if you can receive Ali's pendant
Talk to Ali the Wise in the northernmost building in Nardah.
text.es: Habla con Ali the Wise en el edificio más al norte de Nardah.

chatOptions: 1 How goes the research?
1 Well, I certainly don't like those of the Zamorakian faction.
1 Zaros seems to be an honourable god.
Accept
2 Can you help me get to the Digsite Exam Centre?

text.en: Go to the Exam Centre.
text.es: Ve al Exam Centre.

text.en: If you asked Ali for help getting there, he gave you a Dig Site pendant (or Ali's pendant if you have not unlocked the ability to create Dig Site pendants) to teleport directly there.
text.es: Si le pediste a Ali ayuda para llegar allí, te dio un Dig Site pendant (o el pendiente de Ali si no has desbloqueado la habilidad de crear Dig Site pendants) para teletransportarte directamente allí.

text.en: Alternatively, teleporting to Varrock Dig Site with either pendant for the first time will grant you the Return to Senntisten achievement.
text.es: Alternativamente, teletransportarte a Varrock Dig Site con cualquiera de los dos pendientes por primera vez te otorgará el logro Return to Senntisten.

text.en: Talk to Dr. Nabanik outside of the Exam Centre south of the Digsite.
text.es: Habla con Dr. Nabanik fuera del Exam Centre, al sur del Digsite. ¿Por qué estamos hablando tan bajo?

chatOptions: 1 (Whisper) Why are we speaking so quietly?
1 Azzanadra? You are quite the master of disguise.
1 Why are you here, away from the pyramid?
2 What's Ali's part in this?
3 Why all the secrecy?
4 Just tell me what you want.

text.en: Talk to Terry Balando inside the exam centre for a restoration certificate.
text.es: Habla con Terry Balando dentro del exam centre para conseguir un certificado de restauración.

chatOptions: 1 I'm here about a close friend of mine: Dr Nabanik.
1 He was in the pyramid for a very long time.
1 I've seen those beetles and they're huge.
1 He studies pyramids, particularly their interiors.
1 He has an aged benefactor.

text.en: Talk to Dr. Nabanik. He will give you a rope.
text.es: Habla con Dr. Nabanik. Te dará una cuerda.

text.en: Use the rope on the winch in the north-east dig site, north of The Stormbreaker ship.
text.es: Usa la cuerda en el torno del dig site del noreste, al norte del barco The Stormbreaker.

text.en: Operate the winch to enter the Digsite dungeon.
text.es: Acciona el torno para entrar en la Digsite dungeon.

text.en: Talk to Azzanadra in the southern part of the dungeon.
text.es: Habla con Azzanadra en la parte sur de la mazmorra.

chatOptions: 1 I'd like to talk about the temple.
1 Is there anything I can do to help?
1 Okay, what do I need to do?
2 Tell me about the mission in the north.
Any

text.en: Open the ruined backpack for a battered letter and heat globe.
text.es: Abre la mochila destrozada para conseguir una carta maltrecha y un globo térmico.

text.en: Read the letter and then talk to Azzanadra.
text.es: Lee la carta y luego habla con Azzanadra.

chatOptions: 1 I'd like to talk about the temple.
1 Tell me about the mission in Morytania.
1 I have some questions about the mission in Morytania.
2 Do you have any advice for me?
3 Let's talk about something else.
4 Tell me about the artefacts you need.
1 Tell me about the fortress artefact.
2 Tell me about the Barrows artefact.
4 Never mind.

text.en: Combat equipment and food
Travel to the Barrows.
text.es: Viaja hasta los Barrows.

text.en: Kill the six Barrows Brothers found in their tombs below the ground.
text.es: Mata a los seis Barrows Brothers que se encuentran en sus tumbas bajo tierra.

text.en: Barrows amulets can be used to skip killing up to three brothers.
text.es: Los Barrows amulets se pueden usar para saltarse la muerte de hasta tres hermanos.

text.en: Amulets can only be used on the tombs before the brother is summoned.
text.es: Los amuletos solo se pueden usar en las tumbas antes de que se invoque al hermano.

text.en: The final brother must be killed without using an amulet.
text.es: El último hermano debe ser derrotado sin usar ningún amuleto.

text.en: Once all six brothers are dead, search the chest at the centre of the tunnels beneath the crypts to get the Barrows icon.
text.es: Una vez que los seis hermanos estén muertos, registra el cofre en el centro de los túneles bajo las criptas para conseguir el Barrows icon.

text.en: Telekinetic grab runes, heat globe from the ruined backpack
Food and armour, as you will encounter some aggressive high-level (100+) icefiends and waterfiends, even for players with a high-level combat
Go to the Ghorrock fortress:
text.es: Ve a la fortaleza de Ghorrock:

text.en: First use the canoe near Erjolf from Tale of the Muspah for a quick access. It is located on the west coast of the Rellekka Hunter area, north of fairy ring code DKS.
text.es: Primero usa la canoa cerca de Erjolf de Tale of the Muspah para un acceso rápido. Se encuentra en la costa oeste de la zona de Rellekka Hunter, al norte del código de fairy ring DKS.

text.en: Go east and place the heat globe on the pedestal near the ice block entrance.
text.es: Ve hacia el este y coloca el globo térmico en el pedestal cerca de la entrada del bloque de hielo.

text.en: Squeeze past the ice block.
text.es: Pasa apretujándote junto al bloque de hielo.

text.en: Enter the fortress through the south entrance and climb-up the stairs to the west.
text.es: Entra en la fortaleza por la entrada sur y sube las escaleras hacia el oeste.

text.en: Run to the south-east corner of the castle and climb-down the stairs east.
text.es: Corre hasta la esquina sureste del castillo y baja las escaleras hacia el este.

text.en: Scale up the damaged wall north of the door.
text.es: Escala el muro dañado al norte de la puerta.

text.en: Climb down the smashed rampart in the north-west corner.
text.es: Baja por la almena destrozada en la esquina noroeste.

text.en: Enter the trapdoor in front of you.
text.es: Entra por la trampilla que tienes delante.

text.en: Run east and take the heat globe.
text.es: Corre hacia el este y coge el globo térmico.

text.en: Return to the entrance room of the basement, and place the heat globe on the pedestal on the west side.
text.es: Regresa a la sala de entrada del sótano y coloca el globo térmico en el pedestal del lado oeste.

text.en: A waterfiend will be released. It is immune to fire damage, but does not need to be killed.
text.es: Se liberará un waterfiend. Es inmune al daño de fuego, pero no es necesario matarlo.

text.en: Go inside the west room, then right-click the radiant pedestal to cast Telekinetic Grab on it.
text.es: Entra en la sala oeste, luego haz clic derecho en el pedestal radiante para lanzar Telekinetic Grab sobre él.

text.en: Use the globe on this room's pedestal. Go down the trapdoor.
text.es: Usa el globo en el pedestal de esta sala. Baja por la trampilla.

text.en: A waterfiend will be released. It is immune to fire damage, but does not need to be killed.
text.es: Se liberará un waterfiend. Es inmune al daño de fuego, pero no es necesario matarlo.

text.en: Pick up the globe in the southern room.
text.es: Coge el globo en la sala del sur.

text.en: Use it on the pedestal back in the northern room with the ladder. 2 waterfiends will spawn.
text.es: Úsalo en el pedestal de vuelta en la sala del norte con la escalera. Aparecerán 2 waterfiends.

text.en: Loot the crates in the south room for 40 law runes and 300 air runes.
text.es: Saquea las cajas de la sala del sur para conseguir 40 law runes y 300 air runes.

text.en: Go to the east room and take the globe from the pedestal for an imperfect heat globe.
text.es: Ve a la sala del este y coge el globo del pedestal para conseguir un globo térmico imperfecto.

text.en: Exit the dungeon the way you entered.
text.es: Sal de la mazmorra por donde entraste.

text.en: Scale the damaged wall to the west, then head to the north-east corner to the destroyed pedestal.
text.es: Escala el muro dañado hacia el oeste, luego dirígete a la esquina noreste, hasta el pedestal destruido.

text.en: Insert-globe in the smashed globe-holder on the ground.
text.es: Elige la opción "Insert-globe" en el soporte de globo destrozado en el suelo.

text.en: Choose the push option on the smashed globe-holder on the ground.
text.es: Elige la opción "Empujar" en el soporte de globo destrozado en el suelo.

text.en: After a cutscene, climb down the smashed rampart in the north-west corner.
text.es: Después de una escena cinemática, baja por la almena destrozada en la esquina noroeste.

text.en: Return to the dungeon by re-entering the trapdoor.
text.es: Regresa a la mazmorra volviendo a entrar por la trampilla.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, carry on from where I was.

text.en: Go down the trapdoor in the western room.
text.es: Baja por la trampilla en la sala oeste.

text.en: Run through the dungeon and take the heat globe from the pedestal in the southwestern corner.
text.es: Corre a través de la mazmorra y coge el globo térmico del pedestal en la esquina suroeste.

text.en: Head back east through the hallway you ran through until you reach the southeast corner, where the path turns north.
text.es: Regresa hacia el este por el pasillo por el que corriste hasta llegar a la esquina sureste, donde el camino gira hacia el norte.

text.en: At that corner, look for a pipe on the south wall.
text.es: En esa esquina, busca una tubería en la pared sur.

text.en: Choose the "Place-globe" option on the pipe.
text.es: Elige la opción "Place-globe" en la tubería.

text.en: Choose the "Whack" option on the pipe.
text.es: Elige la opción "Whack" en la tubería.

text.en: Continue into the southeastern room and climb the ladder to go up.
text.es: Continúa hacia la sala sureste y sube por la escalera para subir.

text.en: Head west and kill the ice demon (it cannot be damaged by water spells).
text.es: Dirígete hacia el oeste y mata al ice demon (no puede ser dañado por hechizos de agua).

text.en: Take the Frostenhorn that it drops.
text.es: Coge el Frostenhorn que suelta.

text.en: Barrows icon and Frostenhorn
Return to Azzanadra with the items back at the Senntisten Temple underneath the Dig Site.
text.es: Regresa con Azzanadra con los objetos, de vuelta en el Senntisten Temple bajo el Dig Site.

chatOptions: 1 I'd like to talk about the temple.
1 I have something here for you.
1 What does the Frosthorn do?
1 Okay, what do I need to obtain next?

text.en: The Dig Site pendant can be used to teleport outside the temple (option 2).
text.es: El Dig Site pendant se puede usar para teletransportarte fuera del templo (opción 2).

text.en: Back outside near the winch, talk to the Assassin for a relic.
text.es: De vuelta afuera cerca del torno, habla con el Assassin para conseguir una reliquia.

chatOptions: 1 Mask or no mask, I remember you.
Any
Any
Any

text.en: Return to Azzanadra.
text.es: Regresa con Azzanadra.

chatOptions: 1 I'd like to talk about the temple.
5 Anyway, what now?
2 I'm not interested, I just want a reward
3 Boring! Get on with it!

text.en: After the cutscene, speak to Azzanadra again.
text.es: Después de la escena cinemática, habla de nuevo con Azzanadra.

chatOptions: 1 I'm glad I could help.
Any

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
